# zabbix_role (Data Source)

Fetches a Zabbix role by ID or name. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be provided.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up by ID
data "zabbix_role" "by_id" {
  id = "5"
}

# Look up by name (works for built-in roles too)
data "zabbix_role" "admin_role" {
  name = "Admin role"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the role. One of `id` or `name` must be set.
- `name` (String) Display name of the role. One of `id` or `name` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `rules` (Attributes) Access rules for the role. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rules))
- `type` (String) Role type: `user`, `admin`, or `super_admin`.

<a id="nestedatt--rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules`

Read-Only:

- `actions` (Attributes List) Action access rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rules--actions))
- `actions_default_access` (Boolean) Default access for actions not listed in `actions`.
- `api_access` (Boolean) Whether API access is enabled for this role.
- `api_methods` (Set of String) List of API methods affected by `api_mode`.
- `api_mode` (String) API access mode: `deny` or `allow`.
- `modules` (Attributes List) Module access rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rules--modules))
- `modules_default_access` (Boolean) Default access for modules not listed in `modules`.
- `ui` (Attributes List) UI element access rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rules--ui))
- `ui_default_access` (Boolean) Default access for UI elements not listed in `ui`.

<a id="nestedatt--rules--actions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.actions`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this action is enabled.
- `name` (String) Name of the action.


<a id="nestedatt--rules--modules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.modules`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether access to this module is enabled.
- `module_id` (String) Module ID.


<a id="nestedatt--rules--ui"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.ui`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether access to this UI element is enabled.
- `name` (String) Name of the UI element.
